# LuxAed

> Aedade ja väravate tootmine ja paigaldus Tallinnas ja Harjumaal. Заборы, ворота и калитки под ключ в Таллинне и Харьюмаа. Fences, gates and wickets in Tallinn and Harju County, Estonia. Puit, rullvõrk, 2D/3D-keevisvõrk, metall-lipp, varbaed, profiilplekk ja väravaautomaatika. Üle 15 aasta kogemust, tasuta mõõdistus, 100% soovitab (34 arvustust Facebookis).

## Main pages
- [Avaleht — Eesti (ET)](https://luxaed.ee/)
- [Главная — Русский (RU)](https://luxaed.ee/ru/)
- [Home — English (EN)](https://luxaed.ee/en/)
- [Meist / О компании / About](https://luxaed.ee/meist/)
- [KKK / Вопросы / FAQ](https://luxaed.ee/kkk/)

## Services
- Puitaed / Деревянные заборы / Wooden fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/puitaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/derevyannye/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/wooden/)
- Rullvõrkaed / Заборы из сетки-рабицы / Roll mesh fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/vorkaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/setka-rabitsa/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/roll-mesh/)
- Keevisvõrkaed / Заборы из 2D/3D-сетки / Welded mesh fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/paneelaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/2d-3d-setka/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/mesh/)
- Metall-lippaed / Металлический штакетник / Steel picket fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/lippaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/metallicheskie-lameli/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/steel-picket/)
- Metallaed ja varbaed / Металлические прутковые заборы / Metal bar fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/metallaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/prutkovye/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/metal-bar/)
- Profiilplekk-aed / Заборы из профнастила / Profiled-sheet fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/profiilplekk-aed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/zabory/profnastil/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fences/profiled-sheet/)
- Väravad ja automaatika / Ворота и автоматика / Gates & automation: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/varavad/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/vorota-avtomatika/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/gates-automation/)
- Aia ja värava remont / Ремонт заборов и ворот / Fence & gate repair: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aia-remont/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/remont-zaborov/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/fence-repair/)

## About
- LuxAed team: 15+ years building fences and gates.
- Turnkey: free on-site measurement, materials, installation, exact price up front, no hidden fees.
- Works year-round across Tallinn and all of Harju County.

## Contact
- Phone: +372 5695 8285
- Email: luxaed9@gmail.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LuxxAed
- Area: Tallinn, Harjumaa, Estonia
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00, Sat by appointment
